intro: Spermacoce cerradoana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Brazilian Cerrado region. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Spermacoce cerradoana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
